case_title: OLGA POLISCHUK VS. NEW WORLD MARKET et al

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: BYBEE, ROBERT BRUCE SUBSTITUTED FOR DAHLBERG, JOHN NORMAN AS ATTORNEY FOR SUKHOVITSKY, NENNA SUED ERRONEOUSLY AS NEW WORLD MARKET
